## Description
A clear description of what needs to be done and why.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task is fully implemented
- [ ] Code is committed on its own branch
- [ ] Changes are validated (HTML/CSS validator if applicable)
- [ ] Pull request is linked to this issue before merging

Any relevant details, resources, or constraints to keep in mind while working on this task.
